title: smilax maritima
intro: Smilax maritima, also known as the coastal greenbrier or sea-smilax, is a type of flowering vine native to the coastal regions of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Smilax maritima include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
